message.content:
@startuml
actor "Organization Employee" as employee
participant ":CreateTaskUI" as ui
participant ":CreateTaskController" as controller
database ApplicationPOT #D3D3D3 
app :ApplicationPOT  as app2
session :UserSession   as session1
platform :Platform     as platform1
org    :Organization   as org1


employee ->>ui:asks to create a new task\n#black;1 requests data (reference, designation,\n informal description, technical\ndescription,duration,cost) \n#blue;types requested data 

activate ui

controller->>+lc:getTaskCategories()
note right of lc:#green;5 getTaskCategories()\nnote left of cat::Category:\ncat = getCategoryById(categoryId)\nlc=List<Category>\nend note



deactivate lc




create Task ::task  
new object instance 


alt if category selected then
    
        activate controller
        
         participant ':cat'as Category
            
            opt 
            
                loop for each item in list
                
                    alt condition
                    
                        else
                        
                            end
                            
                        
                    
                
            
        
       
       deactivate controller
      
    
else not select any one 
    
      destroy this
     
      
     
   
    
    
    
    
    
    

@enduml
